Name: UParticleModuleMeshRotationRateMultiplyLife
Description: UCLASS(editinlinenew, hidecategories=Object, meta=(DisplayName = "Mesh Rotation Rate  Life"))

Variables.Name: LifeMultiplier
Variables.Description:
The scale factor that should be applied to the rotation rate.
	 	The value is retrieved using the RelativeTime of the particle.
